mundo.titulo: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
mundo.resumen: A minister confirms talks have taken place but says there will be no mandatory cap on essential food prices.

mundo.titulo: Channel 4 boss 'deeply sorry' over MAFS UK rape allegations
mundo.resumen: Priya Dogra says a Panorama which included allegations from former cast members was "very troubling" to watch.

mundo.titulo: Inflation falls to 2.8% but is expected to rise from here
mundo.resumen: Energy prices were lower due to the government's energy bill support package and lower wholesale prices before the Iran war.

mundo.titulo: Scheme to trial scrapping fit notes to get people back to work
mundo.resumen: The government says the system is "broken", with too many people signed off work with no help to return.

mundo.titulo: Kylie Minogue reveals she had second cancer diagnosis in 2021
mundo.resumen: In a new documentary, the star says she "got through it, again" following successful treatment in 2005.

mundo.titulo: UK waters down new Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
mundo.resumen: The change reflects increasing supply concerns over certain fuels due to the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

negocios.titulo: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
negocios.resumen: A minister confirms talks have taken place but says there will be no mandatory cap on essential food prices.

negocios.titulo: Fuel duty freeze extended until the end of the year
negocios.resumen: Fuel duty was initially cut by 5p in March 2022, under the Conservative government.

negocios.titulo: UK waters down new Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
negocios.resumen: The change reflects increasing supply concerns over certain fuels due to the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

negocios.titulo: Inflation falls to 2.8% but is expected to rise from here
negocios.resumen: Energy prices were lower due to the government's energy bill support package and lower wholesale prices before the Iran war.

negocios.titulo: Boss of Sarah Ferguson-linked firm used royal links to threaten worker with jail
negocios.resumen: In a recording obtained by the BBC, the worker was threatened with jail for allegedly hacking emails at lifestyle app vVoosh.

negocios.titulo: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
negocios.resumen: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.

tecnologia.titulo: GitHub says hackers stole data from thousands of internal repositories
tecnologia.resumen: The code hosting giant GitHub said it was investigating a breach, but said there was no evidence of customer data theft.

tecnologia.titulo: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
tecnologia.resumen: Figma's new AI assistant will be first available on Figma Design

tecnologia.titulo: Quartermaster is building a maritime hive mind
tecnologia.resumen: The Arlington, Virginia-based startup has raised $42 million to equip ships with sensors that blow the current AIS tech out of the water.

tecnologia.titulo: ‘Ask YouTube’ brings AI-powered conversational search to video, adds Gemini Omni to Shorts
tecnologia.resumen: Google is completely revamping its search experience, and that doesn't stop at YouTube.

tecnologia.titulo: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design at IO 2026
tecnologia.resumen: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

tecnologia.titulo: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
tecnologia.resumen: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

tecnologia.titulo: If Google can’t make AI agents useful, maybe no one can
tecnologia.resumen: For years, tech companies have promised AI will give everyone a capable personal assistant but delivered something more like a clueless intern. Over the past six months, that has started to change, thanks largely to the viral open-source AI agent platform OpenClaw. And among the top AI labs now chasing similar success, one seems particularly […]

tecnologia.titulo: The biggest data center ever is becoming a huge problem in Utah
tecnologia.resumen: Utah may host one of the world's most colossal data centers, despite stark warnings from experts and fierce public backlash. Earlier this month, commissioners in Box Elder County signed off on the Stratos Project: a 40,000-acre data center stretching across the county's Hansel Valley. It's supposed to establish American AI dominance, but potentially at the […]

tecnologia.titulo: ‘It’s in the air’: Apple TV’s hottest new shows explore different sides of OnlyFans
tecnologia.resumen: Apple TV is best known for its lineup of science fiction shows and feel-good sitcoms, but of late the streaming service has veered in a different direction. tecnologia.titulo: Android 17 is getting its own version of Apple’s Handoff
tecnologia.resumen: Google is adding a new Android feature that resembles Apple's Handoff, allowing you to start a task on your Android phone and continue it right where you left off from a compatible tablet. "Continue On" is designed to eventually be bidirectional, but Google says that at launch it will only support tasks moving from a […]

tecnologia.titulo: Samsung workers set to strike at worst possible time
tecnologia.resumen: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are gearing up for an 18-day strike after bonus payment negotiations between the company and its union collapsed. The strike is set to start on Thursday and will be limited to Samsung's domestic chipmaking plants, raising concerns around the already constrained production of memory chips amid the ongoing shortage. tecnologia.titulo: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
tecnologia.resumen: The era of ultra-high performance Mercedes EVs is here. The German automaker finally revealed its new super sedan, the AMG GT 4-door coupe, with technology borrowed from the automaker's XX concept that last year made history by driving 24,901 miles in under 8 days at Nardò Ring in southern Italy. With the production model, Mercedes […]
